hypothesis: If a diffusion model incorporates non-negativity and sum-to-one regularization (PCDiff), then it will generate a higher proportion of physically valid (Validityreg) and fabricable (Validityfab) composite material compositions at specified target properties while achieving equal or better fidelity (Density) and diversity (Coverage) than CVAE and TabDDPM, because the physics constraints guide the model toward physically plausible and manufacturable samples.
